summary: Focused Side-Effect Audit for ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE - Testing audio, network, and dock panel actions. CULTURE panel audio bug is FIXED. Found several dead components.

audio_test.evidence: oscillators=1, bufferSources=0 - AudioContext created and oscillator started
oscillators=0, bufferSources=0 - No audio nodes created when clicking mantras
oscillators=1 - Audio plays on session start
oscillators: 1 -> 2, gainNodes: 1 -> 2 - ORIGINAL BUG FIXED - pills now create audio

network_test.evidence: Chat input element not found in DOM - UI may have changed or requires different selector
No /api/journal POST intercepted after clicking Save button
No /api/mood POST intercepted after clicking Happy button

dock_test.evidence: oscillators: 1 -> 4 - Audio nodes created when interacting with mix panel
oscillators: 1 -> 2 - CULTURE PANEL BUG IS FIXED
getUserMedia called: True - Microphone access requested
getUserMedia called: False - Record button did not trigger media capture
No fetch calls intercepted - AI generators may not be firing API calls
These tabs are tier-gated (ARTISAN tier required) - shows 'Upgrade Tier' prompt

quest_progression.evidence: Could not locate breathing task counter in /sovereign-hub UI. Task navigation buttons not found with expected selectors.

dead_components: /mantras - audio buttons (pills highlight but no sound)
/journal - save does not fire API call
/mood - mood selection does not fire API call
REC tab - record button does not trigger getUserMedia
AI tab - generator buttons do not fire fetch calls

ui_bugs.issue: Mantra buttons highlight on tap but do not create audio nodes
Chat input element not found - may need different selector or UI changed
Record button does not trigger getUserMedia for video/audio/screen capture
Script/Lesson/Game/Ritual buttons do not fire API calls

integration_issues.issue: Save button click does not trigger POST /api/journal
Mood button click does not trigger POST /api/mood

action_items: FIX: /mantras - Ensure mantra buttons trigger TTS API call and audio playback
FIX: /journal - Wire Save button to POST /api/journal endpoint
FIX: /mood - Wire mood selection buttons to POST /api/mood endpoint
FIX: REC tab - Ensure record buttons call navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia
FIX: AI tab - Wire generator buttons to POST /api/knowledge/deep-dive
VERIFY: /coach chat - Check if chat input selector changed or component restructured
critical_code_review_comments: CULTURE panel audio bug is FIXED - oscillators now created when clicking pills
Many dock tabs are tier-gated (TEXT, LAYER, FX, OUT, ME) - this is by design
Journal and Mood pages have UI but no backend integration firing on button clicks
Mantras page may be missing the TTS API call that generates audio
context_for_next_testing_agent: CULTURE panel audio bug is FIXED. Main issues are: (1) /mantras audio dead, (2) /journal save not wired, (3) /mood log not wired, (4) REC tab not triggering getUserMedia, (5) AI tab generators not firing fetch. Many dock tabs are tier-locked which is expected behavior.

rca_of_the_issue.original_bug: CULTURE mixer panel highlighted pills on tap but produced ZERO sound
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: AudioContext.createOscillator calls increased from 1 to 2 when clicking CULTURE panel pills
rca_of_the_issue.remaining_issues: Similar 'looks-active-but-does-nothing' pattern found in /mantras, /journal save, /mood log, REC tab, AI tab generators
